mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items(user_id, product_id, sku_id, quantity, checked, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{skuId}, #{quantity}, #{checked}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart_items WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
DELETE FROM cart_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checked = 1
